I'm not a fan of merging a revert since this reintroduces an issue that resolved with this patch. It will be better to just introduce the next patch against master and not reintroduce an issue.

commit.subject: LU-17197 obdclass: revert improve precision of wakeups
commit.message:
LU-17197 obdclass: revert improve precision of wakeups

This revert of:

Lustre-commit: 2c1d6bc91d55f8cc4ffe04352bf4dede1f9ef1bc
Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/44041

due to a performance regression.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-11894
Fixes: 5243630b09 ("LU-15947 obdclass: improve precision of wakeups for mod_rpcs")
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ie3ac2c7f763c90f9043acfe650a195760e08227b
